calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar May-17-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jamie Hawkins and John Conklin in Propria Persona.

The Court asked why they need to establish the fact of marriage. Ms. Hawkins stated that they were told that California does not recognize overseas marriages and that they would need this in the future. The Court confirmed that there is no immediate need and asked the parties if they had reviewed the examiner's notes regarding 103450 of the Health & Safety code. Ms. Hawkins responded that they did not receive anything from the examiner. The Court stated that it understands their argument, that this is a preventative measure just in case, that the petition to establish fact of marriage will be taken under submission and if the Court agrees it will sign the order and if not the parties will be contacted.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
